name: wa_stale_ins_reject
drl: rule W when accumulate( E($v : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): an alpha-PASSING insert whose snapshot ts+N <= clock is REJECTED with NO transient (count never fires 1) — the engine pre-port folded it in and past-due-evicted (the cf719x242 class).
